mapper.sql: id, video_id, user_id, ip_address, user_agent, referer, access_time
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID();
insert into video_access_log
video_id, user_id, ip_address, user_agent, referer, access_time,
#{bean.videoId}, #{bean.userId}, #{bean.ipAddress}, #{bean.userAgent}, #{bean.referer}, #{bean.accessTime},
mapper.select: SELECT v.id as video_id, v.title as video_title, COUNT(al.id) as total_views, COUNT(DISTINCT al.ip_address) as unique_ips, COUNT(DISTINCT al.user_id) as unique_users FROM video v LEFT JOIN video_access_log al ON v.id = al.video_id GROUP BY v.id, v.title ORDER BY total_views DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN user_id IS NULL OR user_id = 0 THEN '游客' ELSE '注册用户' END as user_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM video_access_log WHERE video_id = #{videoId} GROUP BY CASE WHEN user_id IS NULL OR user_id = 0 THEN '游客' ELSE '注册用户' END
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_access, COUNT(DISTINCT video_id) as total_videos, COUNT(DISTINCT ip_address) as unique_ips, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(access_time)) as active_days FROM video_access_log
